name: GIGABYTE B860M EAGLE WIFI6 V2 Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x4 - Support DDR5-9066+(OC) - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen 1 - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 2.1 - Realtek 2.5G LAN - 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6 - Bluetooth 5.3
shortName: GIGABYTE B860M EAGLE WIFI6 V2 Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851
description: Compact Intel Micro-ATX motherboard with LGA 1851 socket and high DDR5 support for professional workloads.
